title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: "Update All" button triggers a single DFU process with unified progress bar for both earbuds and charging case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (earbuds + charging case) is connected
Observe the DFU progress indicator on screen
expected: The "Update All" button triggers a single DFU process for both earbuds and charging case simultaneously, showing one unified progress bar from 0% to 99% for both devices.
